name: GAF_SyteLine_ItemInsert_Tool_v1
description: Create a new item in SyteLine with item code, description, and standard defaults

data.api_docs:
Method: POST
Endpoint: /update/SLItems
CRITICAL: The endpoint above is RELATIVE — the service path 'CSI/IDORequestService/ido' is prepended automatically. Do NOT repeat the service path in the endpoint or add tenant names, config values, 'api', 'invoke', or extra segments.
Headers:
X-Infor-MongooseConfig: <site>
Content-Type: application/json
Body:
The body creates items in SLItems. Batch: Include up to 5 items per call in the Changes array. Each item is a separate object with Action: 1.
{
  "IDOName": "SLItems",
  "RefreshAfterSave": true,
  "Changes": [
    {
      "Action": 1,
      "Properties": [
        {"IsNull": false, "Modified": true, "Name": "Item", "Value": "ITEM-A"},
        {"IsNull": false, "Modified": true, "Name": "Description", "Value": "First Item"},
        {"IsNull": false, "Modified": true, "Name": "UM", "Value": "EA"},
        {"IsNull": false, "Modified": true, "Name": "MatlType", "Value": "M"},
        {"IsNull": false, "Modified": true, "Name": "PMTCode", "Value": "M"},
        {"IsNull": false, "Modified": true, "Name": "ProductCode", "Value": "FG-100"},
        {"IsNull": false, "Modified": true, "Name": "AbcCode", "Value": "B"},
        {"IsNull": false, "Modified": true, "Name": "CostType", "Value": "A"},
        {"IsNull": false, "Modified": true, "Name": "CostMethod", "Value": "S"},
        {"IsNull": false, "Modified": true, "Name": "Stat", "Value": "A"}
      ]
    },
    {
      "Action": 1,
      "Properties": [
        {"IsNull": false, "Modified": true, "Name": "Item", "Value": "ITEM-B"},
        {"IsNull": false, "Modified": true, "Name": "Description", "Value": "Second Item"},
        {"IsNull": false, "Modified": true, "Name": "UM", "Value": "EA"},
        {"IsNull": false, "Modified": true, "Name": "MatlType", "Value": "P"},
        {"IsNull": false, "Modified": true, "Name": "PMTCode", "Value": "P"},
        {"IsNull": false, "Modified": true, "Name": "ProductCode", "Value": "FG-100"},
        {"IsNull": false, "Modified": true, "Name": "AbcCode", "Value": "B"},
        {"IsNull": false, "Modified": true, "Name": "CostType", "Value": "A"},
        {"IsNull": false, "Modified": true, "Name": "CostMethod", "Value": "S"},
        {"IsNull": false, "Modified": true, "Name": "Stat", "Value": "A"}
      ]
    }
  ]
}
CRITICAL: ONLY use the exact property Names listed above (Item, Description, UM, MatlType, PMTCode, ProductCode, AbcCode, CostType, CostMethod, Stat). Do NOT add any other properties. The IDO will reject unknown properties.
PMTCode valid values: M (Manufactured), P (Purchased), T (Transferred). No other values are accepted.
ProductCode must be a valid code from the system. Safe default: FG-100. Do NOT use RM-100 (invalid).
NOTE: Action 1 = insert. All 10 properties above are required per item.
Batch: Include up to 5 items per call. Each item gets its own object in the Changes array.
Example Request:
POST /update/SLItems
Batch create items ITEM-A and ITEM-B (up to 5 per call):
data.responseInstructions:
The API responds with a JSON object indicating success or failure.
Key Response Fields:
- Success: Boolean indicating if insert succeeded
- Message: Error message if Success is false
- Items: Array with created item record (includes Item code and _ItemId)
- _ItemId: Unique record identifier for the created item
If Success is false, check the Message field for the error reason (e.g., duplicate item code, invalid property).
CRITICAL - IF ERROR OCCURS INCLUDE THE BELOW IN RESPONSE
  ---DEBUG---
  FULL_URL: [The complete URL that was called]
  FULL_PAYLOAD: [The exact request body sent (JSON format)]
  FULL_RESPONSE: [The complete API response received]
  ---END DEBUG---

instructions:
Use this tool to create items in SyteLine.
BATCH: Include up to 5 items per Changes array to reduce API calls.
IMPORTANT: Always use ItemSearch first to ensure items do not already exist!
IMPORTANT: ONLY use the 10 properties listed in api_docs. Do NOT add any extra properties.
PMTCode: M=Manufactured, P=Purchased, T=Transferred. NO other values.
ProductCode: Use FG-100 as safe default. Do NOT use RM-100.
Returns the created items with Item codes and _ItemIds.

SITE PARAMETER (REQUIRED):
- The <site> placeholder must be filled with the site value from the agent's input
- Format: [TENANT]_DALS (e.g., '<YOUR_SITE>')
